reviews.review_description: I'm a youtuber that downloads fan games and I sometimes upload it onto YouTube and I played thia game and it's really really good! But that's not what I'm asking I'm jst asking if I can have the stick or badge? you dont have to!! But I have been reporting toxic kids and sometimes I wish I had the stick😂 But yeah The game is rlly good and I love it! Have a blessed day and stay blessed yall!
flying is cool every thing else is poo poo my friend says he is impressed he can even walk in the game
This game is really good, I helped add the wardrobe and some cosmetics and I hope to help update the game again soon!
Me and my friend tried this out and it's actually good for this quality and I like how it's at a constant 70 frames.
